name: piplup
flavor_texts: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.
It lives along shores in northern countries. A skilled swimmer, it dives for over 10 minutes to hunt.
A poor walker, it often falls down. However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care.
It doesn’t like to be taken care of. It’s difficult to bond with since it won’t listen to its Trainer.
Prefers cold climes and appears along coasts. It's an adorable little thing—as cute as any child—but it's also prideful, unwilling to accept handouts from people.
text: Piplup is the Penguin Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: torrent, competitive (hidden). Base stats — HP: 53, Attack: 51, Defense: 53, Sp. Atk: 61, Sp. Def: 56, Speed: 40. Evolution line: piplup → prinplup → empoleon. Lore: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold. It lives along shores in northern countries. A skilled swimmer, it dives for over 10 minutes to hunt. A poor walker, it often falls down. However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care. It doesn’t like to be taken care of. It’s difficult to bond with since it won’t listen to its Trainer. Prefers cold climes and appears along coasts. It's an adorable little thing—as cute as any child—but it's also prideful, unwilling to accept handouts from people.
